PowerShell($zip = "G:\\My Drive\\Design Work\\Hunters Pest Control\\Website Build\\files\\hunters-services-site.zip"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $z = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($zip\); $z.Entries | ForEach-Object { "{0}  [{1}]" -f $_.FullName, $_.Length }; $z.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell(function tryver\($n,$c\){ try { $v = & $c 2>$null; "OK  $n : $v" } catch { "NO  $n" } }; tryver "python" { \(python --version\) }; tryver "python3" { \(python3 --version\) }; tryver "node" { \(node --version\) }; tryver "npm" { \(npm --version\) }; tryver "netlify" { \(netlify --version\) }; tryver "magick" { \(magick --version | Select-Object -First 1\) }; tryver "git" { \(git --version\) })

PowerShell($u = "https://static.wixstatic.com/media/8c8a06_0b7d4c13092b42e1b970b330519d5560~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_1200,h_700,al_c,q_90,enc_auto/file.jpg"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -Method Head -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 25; "STATUS $\($r.StatusCode\)  TYPE $\($r.Headers['Content-Type']\)  LEN $\($r.Headers['Content-Length']\)" } catch { "ERR $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
